body.title: D-capability-protocol-2026-05-03
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-capability-protocol-2026-05-03

**Closed at:** 2026-05-05T00:27:39.921093+00:00
**Ticket count:** 6 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-audit-ticket-two-sided-build-check (S) — CLOSED: audit-ticket two-sided-build check — enforce capability tickets ship handler + skill consumer  `done` — Added Check 16 (two-sided-build) to audit-ticket SKILL.md. Triggers on capability-tagged tickets or MCP/shim/handler keywords; verifies both handler + skill-consumer files in Affected files; SPLITs wi
- T-sprint-stepn-teach-igor (S) — CLOSED: Sprint Step N — teach-Igor palace deposit step  `done` — Added Step 7.5 to /sprint and Step 6.5 to /sprint-batch per-ticket loop: 'what would I deposit into Igor's palace from this work?' Default-skip is load-bearing; deposit only when novel reasoning emerg
- T-sprint-step0-capability-delegate (S) — CLOSED: Sprint Step 0 — capability-aware delegate prompt before claim  `done` — Added /sprint Step 1.5 + /sprint-batch per-ticket Step 0.5: capability check (mcp__* tools, datacenter_manifest) before claim, surface delegate option as one-liner when minion/device matches ticket ta
- T-mcp-igor-cognition-debug-capability (M) — CLOSED: Igor cognition-debug as MCP capability — claim/status/release verbs + skill consumer  `done` — debug_session.py (claim/status/release/query/log_line) + debug_session_cli.py + 10 tests. Skills updated. Commit 32b2d901. MCP surface deferred to UnseenUniversity arrival.
- T-cc1-test-minion (M) — CLOSED: CC.1 test minion — haiku-backed skill executor for end-to-end skill regression  `done` — CC1Minion(AgentBase): haiku executor + Bash interceptor; sprint_claim fixture; 5 unit tests + 1 live; commit 3194885a
- T-mcp-db-query-capability (M) — DESIGNED: DB query as MCP capability — query/dispatch verbs + skill consumer migration  `done` — db_query+db_dispatch in igor_mcp.py; 12 tests; context-load Steps 2a/2b + day-close-audit Steps 9/12 migrated from psql; commit f7e35cd0

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._
